ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - Regions and Territories
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
RimSynapse - Regions and Territories Official Wiki and Documentation: https://github.com/RimSynapse/Regions-and-Territories/wiki
Handles mapping dynamics, including dynamic geographic province generation, world map overlays, regional faction territory control, population density mapping, road generation, and ruins placement.
Requires: Map Mode Framework
